name: Instant Gourmet Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Place coffee crystals in a blender; grind to make them fine.
2. Mix all ingredients together and place in plastic freezer bags.
3. When ready to use, put 2-4 tablespoons of the mixture in a mug.
4. Fill with boiling water (3 tablespoons for an 8 oz mug).
